name: Yogurt-Topped Strawberry Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 8-oz carton strawberry or vanilla low-fat yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat griddle or skillet to 375°F.
2. Grease lightly with oil.
3. In a medium bowl, combine pancake mix, sugar, cinnamon, and water; stir until no large lumps remain.
4. Fold in strawberries.
5. For each pancake, pour about 1/4 cup batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook for 1-1 1/2 minutes, turning when edges look cooked and bubbles begin to break on the surface.
7. Continue cooking for another 1-1 1/2 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Spoon yogurt over each serving.
9. Garnish with additional strawberries if desired.
6 servings (12 pancakes)
